issues.description: 100% empty strings across all 100 records. This is the primary flag for whether an order has been billed — its absence makes 'delivered but not billed' queries unreliable without joining to billing_document_items.
issues.suggested_fix: Derive and backfill this field by joining sales_order_items to billing_document_items via delivery chain. Alternatively treat empty string as 'Not Billed'.

issues.column: salesGroup, salesOffice, totalCreditCheckStatus, overallSdDocReferenceStatus, headerBillingBlockReason, deliveryBlockReason
issues.description: All 6 columns are 100% empty strings across all records. They carry no data and add noise to the schema.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop these columns from the normalized schema or mark as nullable with NULL instead of empty string.

issues.description: Monetary amount stored as a string type instead of numeric. Requires casting before any arithmetic or aggregation.
issues.suggested_fix: Cast to DECIMAL(15,2) during ingestion. Apply to all amount fields across all financial entities.

issues.description: Item numbers use short unpadded format ('10', '20', '30'). OutboundDeliveryItem.referenceSdDocumentItem uses zero-padded 6-digit format ('000010', '000020'). Direct string joins will fail without normalization.
issues.suggested_fix: Normalize all item number fields to a consistent format at ingestion. Recommended: LPAD to 6 digits ('000010'), or strip leading zeros on the delivery side. Apply consistently to: salesOrderItem, deliveryDocumentItem, referenceSdDocumentItem, billingDocumentItem.

issues.description: 82% of sales order item records (137/167) have an empty rejection reason. Only meaningful when items are actually rejected.
issues.suggested_fix: Store as NULL instead of empty string. Only populated when salesDocumentRjcnReason is set.

issues.description: 100% empty across all 167 records.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop from normalized schema or store as NULL.

issues.description: Time fields are stored as nested JSON objects {hours, minutes, seconds} instead of ISO 8601 time strings or timestamps. Cannot be stored natively in relational columns without transformation.
issues.suggested_fix: Flatten to TIME type at ingestion: combine creationDate + creationTime into a single TIMESTAMP column 'createdAt'. Same for actualGoodsMovementDate + actualGoodsMovementTime.

issues.description: Null in 83/86 records (96%). Cross-check confirms all null records have overallGoodsMovementStatus='A' (goods movement not yet posted). Logically consistent but means most deliveries are unposted.
issues.suggested_fix: Not a data error — reflects real business state. Ensure query logic treats null actualGoodsMovementDate as 'goods not yet moved' rather than missing data.

issues.description: 100% empty strings across all 86 records.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop or store as NULL.

issues.description: Zero-padded 6-digit format ('000010') while SalesOrderItem and BillingDocumentItem use unpadded format ('10'). Inconsistent across all three entities that form the O2C item chain.
issues.suggested_fix: Normalize to consistent format at ingestion. Strip or pad consistently across SalesOrderItem, OutboundDeliveryItem, and BillingDocumentItem.

issues.description: 100% null across all 137 delivery item records. No audit trail for item-level changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Populate from source system or drop the column if unavailable.

issues.description: 100% empty across all 137 records.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop or store as NULL.

issues.description: 17% of records (24/137) have empty batch number. Only relevant for batch-managed materials.
issues.suggested_fix: Store as NULL when not applicable.

issues.description: 80 billing documents have billingDocumentIsCancelled=true but cancelledBillingDocument is empty string in ALL of them. The field is supposed to reference the cancellation document number but is never populated.
issues.suggested_fix: For cancelled billing documents, populate cancelledBillingDocument by cross-referencing the billing_document_cancellations table. If the field represents the cancellation reversal document, clarify semantics and source from the SAP system.

issues.description: The billing_document_cancellations table is a redundant duplicate of billing_document_headers filtered to billingDocumentIsCancelled=true. It adds no additional columns or data — cancelledBillingDocument is 100% empty in both tables.
issues.example: 80/163 billing_document_headers records have billingDocumentIsCancelled=true; billing_document_cancellations has exactly 80 records with identical schema
issues.suggested_fix: Merge into billing_document_headers. The cancellation status is already captured by billingDocumentIsCancelled=true. Drop the separate cancellations table.

issues.description: Same issue as OutboundDelivery: creationTime stored as nested {hours, minutes, seconds} object.
issues.suggested_fix: Flatten creationDate + creationTime into a single TIMESTAMP 'createdAt' column at ingestion.

issues.description: Monetary amount stored as string.
issues.suggested_fix: Cast to DECIMAL(15,2) at ingestion.

issues.description: References OutboundDeliveryItem.deliveryDocumentItem but uses unpadded format ('10') while delivery items use '000010'. Cross-entity join requires normalization.
issues.suggested_fix: Normalize item number format consistently at ingestion across all entities.

issues.description: Monetary amount stored as string.
issues.suggested_fix: Cast to DECIMAL(15,2) at ingestion.

issues.description: 56 out of 120 payment records (47%) have negative amounts. These likely represent credit memos or payment reversals, but there is no debit/credit indicator field to distinguish payment types. Cannot determine transaction direction without external context.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a derived 'paymentType' column: CREDIT if amount > 0, DEBIT/REVERSAL if amount < 0. Alternatively source the debitCreditCode field from the originating FI document.

issues.column: invoiceReference, invoiceReferenceFiscalYear, salesDocument, salesDocumentItem, assignmentReference, costCenter
issues.description: All 6 fields are 100% null across all 120 payment records. Direct document references from payment to invoice/sales order are completely absent. The only link to billing is indirect via accountingDocument.
issues.suggested_fix: The accountingDocument field is the reliable join key to billing_document_headers. Document in schema that invoiceReference/salesDocument are not populated in this dataset and should not be used for joins.

issues.description: Monetary amount stored as string.
issues.suggested_fix: Cast to DECIMAL(15,2) at ingestion.

issues.description: Both fields are 100% empty across all 123 journal entry records.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop or store as NULL.

issues.description: Monetary amount stored as string.
issues.suggested_fix: Cast to DECIMAL(15,2) at ingestion.

issues.description: businessPartner and customer fields are identical in every record (0 mismatches across all 8 records). One field is entirely redundant.
issues.suggested_fix: Use 'businessPartner' as the canonical primary key. Drop the 'customer' field from the merged entity.

issues.description: Three fields store the same company name. All three are identical for organization-type partners.
issues.example: businessPartnerName='Cardenas, Parker and Avila', organizationBpName1='Cardenas, Parker and Avila', businessPartnerFullName='Cardenas, Parker and Avila'
issues.suggested_fix: Retain only 'businessPartnerName' as the canonical name field.

issues.description: 6/8 records (75%) missing cityName and streetName; 5/8 (62%) missing postalCode. More than half the customers have incomplete address data.
issues.suggested_fix: Source complete address data from SAP BP master or flag records with incomplete addresses. These fields are critical for customer identification.

issues.description: 6/8 customer company assignments have empty paymentTerms. Payment terms exist on the sales area assignment (customerPaymentTerms) and on the sales order header, but not on the company code assignment.
issues.suggested_fix: Use customerPaymentTerms from customer_sales_area_assignments or sales_order_headers.customerPaymentTerms as the reliable payment terms source.

issues.description: 17-21% of sales area assignment records missing logistics configuration fields.
issues.suggested_fix: Store as NULL. Accept that some sales areas have no default incoterms (overridden at order level).

issues.description: Both fields are 100% null/empty across all 69 product records.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop from normalized schema.

issues.description: product_descriptions is a separate table with a language key, but only English ('EN') exists in the dataset (69/69 records). The language dimension adds no value for this dataset.
issues.suggested_fix: Flatten productDescription directly into the Product entity during ingestion. No multilingual support needed for current dataset.

issues.description: Both fields are 100% empty across all 44 plants.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop from normalized schema.

issues.description: All 4 fields are 100% empty across all 3,036 records. The table is dominated by empty fields — only 5 out of 9 columns carry any data.
issues.suggested_fix: Drop the 4 unpopulated columns from the normalized schema. Retain only: product, plant, availabilityCheckType, mrpType, profitCenter.

critical_findings: All monetary amounts stored as strings — must cast to DECIMAL at ingestion
Item number format inconsistency (SO: '10' vs Delivery: '000010') breaks cross-entity joins without normalization
Time fields stored as nested JSON objects — must flatten to TIMESTAMP at ingestion
46.7% of payment records have negative amounts with no debit/credit indicator
cancelledBillingDocument field is 100% empty despite billingDocumentIsCancelled=true on 80 records
75% of customer addresses missing cityName and streetName
